forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 50. West wind 7 to 10 mph.

forecast.name: Thursday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 71, with temperatures falling to around 67 in the afternoon. Northwest wind 5 to 9 mph.

weather_report:
In the stillness of the night, the city of San Francisco enfolds itself under a blanket of scattered clouds, a promise of clarity yet to come. The cool night air lingers around fifty, a reminder that as the day arrives, the ochre light of dawn will soon break, beckoning forth a mostly sunny Thursday. With afternoon temperatures gently descending to a comfortable sixty-seven, the morning will reveal a vibrant tableau as it stretches into the bright hour, framed by soft northwest winds that comb through the streets.

As the sun ascends, expect the gentle embrace of warmth, laced with hints of the ocean’s breath as formerly shrouded destinations like the Golden Gate Bridge emerge from their foggy slumber. While the iconic marine layer may linger in pockets closer to the bay, if all goes as forecasted, it's a day to relish in the outdoors, perhaps sipping a warm coffee at a quaint café while people-watching or enjoying the dynamic canvas of the city at your leisure. Don a light jacket to match the cool morning air, but prepare to shed layers as the day's warmth takes center stage. With the essence of spring in the air, a stroll through Golden Gate Park or a leisurely bike ride along the Embarcadero may offer just the respite one needs—simple, yet deeply fulfilling.
